query:
UPDATE snippets
            SET first_viewed_at = COALESCE(first_viewed_at, now()),
                expires_at = LEAST(
                    COALESCE(expires_at, now() + make_interval(secs => $2)),
                    now() + make_interval(secs => $2)
                )
            WHERE id = $1 AND burn_after_read = true AND deleted_at IS NULL
            RETURNING id
